calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-30-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Byrne appeared by zoom for Emily Kyle (administrator).

Mr. Byrne addressed the issues raised in the tentative ruling. The court stated that it reads the language differently than Mr. Byrne, that it does not see the language as being directory and it is not necessary to do a special needs trust or a testamentary trust either, and that it sees the language as being precatory. The court also stated that it does not believe it was the decedent's intent to go through all of these additional steps, that it will grant the petition and strike the special needs trust language, that all of the money will go to Emily, and that she can decide when and how to interpret this language and give Paul the money when she decides to. Mr. Byrne stated that they were concerned about Paul losing his public benefits/SSI and that he would prefer that Emily give Paul small amounts. The First and Final Account of Administrator, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Sae Phan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Continued To Jul-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Daniel Byrne appeared by zoom for Emily Kyle (administrator).

Mr. Byrne stated that there are missing statements, that he needs to complete the inventory and appraisal, that the tax preprayer has completed the tax returns and that Franchise tax board has been paid $3500.00. Status on close of estate is continued to July 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Petition to be filed by July 05, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Brown. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-31-2023 Continued To Jun-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Daniel Byrne Esq. via zoom, for Emily Kyle, Administrator.

Mr. Byrne reported that everything was done with the exception of tax returns, that the inventory and appraisal was filed yesterday, that the petition for final distribution has been prepared, that his client is working with a CPA. and that the petition for final distribution will be filed once the last few months' information is added.

Status on close is continued to June 06, 2023, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects either a petition for final distribution or petition to approve further report on status on administration to be on file prior to the next hearing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt/Jackie Alameda. Deputy: Pleigo. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-11-2023 Continued To Jan-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-13-2022 Continued To Jan-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Daniel Byrne, Esq. for Emily Kyle.
No other appearance on this matter.

Mr. Byrne confirms that the property is vacant desert land located in Siskiyou County. Brief discussions are held regarding Ms. Kyle's ability to obtain a Texas driver's license. Mr. Byrne states that the Texas DMV was not open, and that Ms. Kyle's California driver's license is still valid. The Court inquired about the need for a guardian ad litem for Mr. Axionoff. Mr. Bryne stated that Mr. Axionoff is not competent, that he is not in a conservatorship, that he had spoken with Mr. Axionoff's rep payee, and that prior to distribution he would address that issue. The Court stated that the guardian ad litem issue should be looked at sooner rather than later.

No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Amended Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated February 27, 2019 is admitted to probate. Emily Kyle is appointed as the administrator with the will annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Michael Kasolas is appointed the probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 13, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: C. Chan. Matter not reported.
